summary: Completed frontend testing for C&C Property Care logo integration. All tests passed successfully.

Brand name 'C&C Property Care' is visible next to logo
Brand subtitle 'Long Island, NY' is visible on desktop
Header navigation links (Services, About Me) are clickable
Header CTA buttons (Call, Book) are visible and functional
Hero section CTA buttons (Call, Book, Email) are clickable
No error elements found on page
